items.title: JPMorgan reveals new Bitcoin target amid market pullback
items.description: Bitcoin (BTC) could climb to $240,000 over the long term, according to a recent JPMorgan note assessing the asset’s evolving market structure. items.title: Wall Street Sees 8,200 on the Table: JPMorgan Says the AI Rally Isn't Over Yet
items.description: Top strategists say the S&P 500 could surge another 20% by end-2026--if AI momentum and earnings keep delivering.
